name: Karate
comment: Hard, varied session — 908kcal across 1h54m signals genuine training load. Classic karate HR profile: 27% Z1 recovery between bursts, 43% Z3-4 intensity. Max 173bpm and 20% Z4 time suggests sparring rounds or dynamic kata sequences. Well-distributed load — elevated but within manageable range given RHR the next morning remained normal.
